summary: Comprehensive testing of Decorous construction lead generation website completed successfully. All backend APIs functional, frontend fully responsive with working lead forms and cost calculator.

design_issues.issue: Blog posts are displayed but may benefit from better card layout styling

passed_tests: All 17 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Homepage hero section with proper branding and lead form
Navigation menu with Services dropdown (5 services visible)
Lead form submission on homepage (POST /api/leads working)
Cost Calculator full flow - calculate and lead capture working
Blog page displays 20+ articles with proper categorization
Projects page shows project cards with filtering
Cities list page shows 11+ service locations
WhatsApp floating button functional with correct number (917008863329)
Call buttons with correct phone number (7008863329)
Mobile responsive design with bottom navigation bar
Premium color scheme correctly implemented (Deep Blue #1a365d + Gold #F5A623)
